item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 5min Not again, Robbie Cita AFTV @AFTVMedia · 7min Robbie has done it AGAIN!
He’s out at the first time of asking after picking Manchester United to beat Leeds.
Think you can beat Lee Judges in Final One Standing? Enter on @WilliamHill and outlast him to win a share of £50K! It's free to 1 537

item.title: WilliamHill: William Hill @WilliamHill · 29min Over 50.5k players beat Robbie tonight as Manchester United suffer their first defeat
item.description:
William Hill @WilliamHill · 29min Over 50.5k players beat Robbie tonight as Manchester United suffer their first defeat to Leeds at home in 45 years (1-2).
Did you beat Robbie?
18+ | GambleAware 1 1 1 mil
